Created attachment 202396
fd.diff

textproc/fd: Update to 7.3.0

- Take over maintainership
- Remove BASH, FISH, ZSH options. Always install completion files
  per recommendation in the Porter's Handbook [1]

Changes:	https://github.com/sharkdp/fd/releases
PR:		???????
Approved by:	andoriyu@gmail.com (maintainer) NOT YET

Test builds on 11.2/amd64 and 12.0/i386 with incoming
lang/rust 1.33.0 update ok [2].

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/shell-completion.html
[2] https://reviews.freebsd.org/D19354
